description: V i i DOWNING CONVENTION Stormy tlatherlng at Tatilcquah and Itt Reaults The littarent contest ever wit neesed In a political convention io the Cheeokee nation in either the National or the Downing party took place at Tahlequab this week and resulted in the final Domina tion ol Wiu C Rogers of this dis trict for principal chief and David M Faulkner ol Sequoyah for aa eintar1 chief The vole stood twenty eight for Rogers twenty five for Dudington and one for Joe Lahay giving Rogers a majority ol two over all L B Bell of Vi Dita and V V Hasting of Th lequah led the Rogers forcea and finally succeeded in defeating Buf fington There were two contest ing delegations from Delaware district one delegation for Bull ington and the other for Rogers Each were given a half vote prao tically nullifying the Delaware vote Following U the list of delegates from the Dine districts COOWKE8COOWBE B Wright j C Hogao L D Daniels Wash Goes North Lind ley J 8 Davenport 60ING8NAKE Watt Whitmire Cummiog Snell Tom WelchjJohn Brown Thomas Wagun 6am Manus CANADIAN WilliamMcLaln W II Barker William Harnsge Dave Faulkner jr Ctiftrlea West E E
